title: How do they take off the plugsuits anyway
display_title: How do they take off the plugsuits anyway
wikitext:
[]: How do they take off the plugsuits, anyway?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Mar 05, 2013 8:26 pm I just realized I don't recall ever seeing them remove the things. There's several hundred shots of them wearing the suits, but they never remove them. Do they just repressurize them or something, or what?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Mar 05, 2013 8:32 pm Don't they remove Shinji's plugsuit after he was hit by Zeruel's beam?

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Mar 05, 2013 8:40 pm You mean Ramiel? No, they just popped him out of the plug, and the next shot is him naked in the coffin.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Mar 05, 2013 9:21 pm The pressure seal buttons on the cuff of the plugsuit work the other way as well; presumably by pressing the cuff again, the suit will depressurize and the wearer will be able to remove the suit with no difficulty. See Episode 7 and Mari's scene from 2.0 when she boards Unit-02 for images of an unsealed plugsuit actually on a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Wed Mar 06, 2013 12:08 pm We see Asuka's unsealed plugsuit in Episode 8, as well. What I want to know is how the sleeveless ones work. Only Rei wears them in the series proper, but Asuka has one on when she comes back from the LCL. Do they have a legless version lying around if they have leg injuries?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Mar 06, 2013 12:59 pm Chuckman wrote: What I want to know is how the sleeveless ones work. Only Rei wears them in the series proper, but Asuka has one on when she comes back from the LCL. Do they have a legless version lying around if they have leg injuries?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Mar 06, 2013 1:58 pm riffraff11235 wrote: My guess is that you can detach the sleeves or the leggings from the original plugsuits.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Mar 07, 2013 1:07 am Just prior to Operation Yashima we also see a silhouette of Rei getting suited up; I'm not sure how much you can make of it, but that's the only other instance I can remember of plug suits being put on/removed.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Mar 07, 2013 1:00 pm Presumably the same way you take them off, really. But removing clothes is, of course, always more interesting than putting them on... Ep 6 (or was it the 1.11 version?) shows us that the collar part is attached separately before pressurizing them, so you probably have to open it again before you can get your head out of there.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Mar 07, 2013 10:07 pm Teleportation.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Mar 11, 2013 3:39 pm My question is how they get out of the entry plug, I don't seem to recall any part besides Shinji manually opening Rei's entry plug, but that is all I remember.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Mar 11, 2013 4:08 pm Rj123541 wrote: My question is how they get out of the entry plug, I don't seem to recall any part besides Shinji manually opening Rei's entry plug, but that is all I remember.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Mar 11, 2013 4:16 pm riffraff11235 wrote: Just like a regular cockpit, I imagine. The seat moves back until it reaches the hatch, the pilot opens the hatch from the inside and steps out.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Mar 11, 2013 4:21 pm Rj123541 wrote: I was thinking it would be something like that, but would that mean that the door is there for emergencies?

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Mon Mar 11, 2013 4:23 pm Ok, then I will just go with that then.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Mar 11, 2013 7:20 pm Rj123541 wrote: Ok, then I will just go with that then.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Mar 11, 2013 7:31 pm There's also an instance while Shinji is in Leliel's sea of dirac that he attempts to free himself via an escape hatch but has no luck.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Mar 12, 2013 2:06 am They finessed all the exit process, skipping to the next interesting bits like the mission defbrief. There was one sequence when they showed the full boarding process where the pilots seat was inserted into the plug before the plug itself was inserted, though I can't remember off-hand what episode that was in.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Mar 12, 2013 7:04 pm They show the boarding process "in reverse" at the beginning of episode #06, with Shinji being taken out of the plug. You may be thinking of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Elect G-Max » Thu Mar 28, 2013 5:59 pm There's a hentai movie floating around the Internets, which demonstrates how Rei removes her plugsuit. It's not complicated.
